title: Better Cauldrons
description: Ports the cool cauldron features from Bedrock Edition to Java!
body:
![Better Cauldrons mod wordmark](https://cdn.squiggles.dev/screenshots/bettercauldrons_title.png) ---
A mod that ports the cool cauldron features from Bedrock Edition to Java!

     
## Features ### Dyeing Interact on any water-filled cauldron to dye the water. Afterward, interact with any dyeable item to dye it that colour. You can also mix dyes!
--- ### Potions Interact with an empty cauldron with any effect-giving potion to store it in the cauldron. A cauldron can hold up to three of the same potion. Standing in the cauldron will give you the effect of whatever potion is inside!
